headers.value: default-src 'none'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://www.gstatic.com https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://fonts.gstatic.com; font-src https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https:; connect-src 'self' https://*.googleapis.com https://*.firebaseio.com wss://*.firebaseio.com; worker-src 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests
